name: anveesa
description: AI agent CLI wrapper - Node.js interface for the Rust anveesa binary

scripts.install: node -e 'console.log("anveesa CLI requires Rust binary. Run: cargo build --release")'
scripts.postinstall: node -e 'if (process.platform !== "linux" && process.platform !== "darwin" && process.platform !== "win32") { console.error("Platform not supported") } else { console.log("anveesa CLI wrapper installed") }'

author: Anveesa
